problem solution method	Light-Based Device
Subset-Sum Problem
A light-based device uses light rays to solve the Subset-Sum problem by traversing a graph-like representation and checking for a ray whose total delay is equal to the target value.

World Athletics Championship
**Tokyo, the Host City of the World Athletics Championship**

Tokyo has been selected as the host city for the esteemed World Athletics Championship. This prestigious event brings together athletes from around the globe to compete in various track and field events. As a host city, Tokyo will provide a world-class venue for the championship, offering state-of-the-art facilities and infrastructure to ensure a seamless and exciting experience for both participants and spectators.

The choice of Tokyo as the host city reflects the city's rich history of hosting international sporting events and its ability to deliver exceptional logistical support. As the host city, Tokyo will be responsible for providing accommodation, transportation, and other essential services for athletes, officials, and spectators. The city's reputation for efficiency and hospitality will undoubtedly contribute to the success of the championship.

The World Athletics Championship is an international competition that features a range of track and field events, including sprinting, distance running, jumping, and throwing disciplines. The event attracts top athletes from around the world, who compete against each other in pursuit of medals and personal bests. As a host city, Tokyo will provide a unique opportunity for local athletes to compete alongside international competitors, promoting athletic excellence and inspiring future generations.

In addition to its role as a host city, Tokyo is also a significant event location, bringing together international competitors, officials, and spectators from diverse backgrounds. The championship offers a platform for cultural exchange, education, and entertainment, showcasing the city's vibrant spirit and warm hospitality. As the host city, Tokyo will work closely with the International Association of Athletics Federations (IAAF) to ensure that the event meets the highest standards of quality, safety, and integrity.

In summary, Tokyo has been chosen as the host city for the World Athletics Championship due to its extensive experience in hosting international sporting events. As a world-class venue, Tokyo will provide an exceptional setting for athletes to compete and push their limits. With its rich history, vibrant culture, and warm hospitality, Tokyo is poised to deliver an unforgettable experience for all participants and spectators involved in this prestigious championship.<SEP>event location, international competition<SEP>The World Athletics Championship is being hosted in Tokyo.<SEP>The World Athletics Championship is being hosted in Tokyo.<SEP>The World Athletics Championship was being hosted in Tokyo.<SEP>Tokyo hosted the World Athletics Championship.
